studentPlans.collegeCommuteDesc: Special pricing for regular commutes between college and home
studentPlans.cashbackDesc: Earn 5% cashback on every ride that you can use for future bookings

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions
faq.q1: How do I book a ride?
faq.a1: Simply open the app, enter your pickup location and destination, choose your preferred vehicle, and tap Book Ride. Our driver will arrive within minutes.
faq.a2: Yes, all our drivers undergo thorough background checks and verification. Your safety is our top priority.
faq.a3: We accept credit/debit cards, digital wallets, UPI, and cash payments. You can also link your wallet for prepaid credits.
faq.q4: Can I schedule a ride in advance?
faq.a4: Yes, you can schedule rides up to 30 days in advance at no additional cost. Just select the scheduled ride option when booking.
faq.q5: What if I need to cancel my ride?
faq.a5: You can cancel free of charge if you cancel within 2 minutes of booking. After that, a small cancellation fee may apply.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help
contact.supportDesc: Our customer support team is always available to help
